coreJobStatement: Install, commission, and maintain plumbing, heating, ventilation, and air-conditioning systems in buildings to deliver thermal comfort, indoor air quality, potable water, and sanitary drainage
hierarchy: Process VN (L7 through L4) — the sequential service-delivery process a contractor executes, and the equipment/tools deployed at each step

l6Systems.name: Assessment & Load Calculation
l6Systems.jobFamily: Evaluate building conditions and calculate thermal, hydraulic, and plumbing loads

l6Systems.name: System Design & Specification
l6Systems.jobFamily: Design mechanical layouts and specify equipment, materials, and controls

l6Systems.name: Rough-In & Distribution Installation
l6Systems.jobFamily: Install piping, ductwork, drainage, and infrastructure before enclosure

l6Systems.name: Equipment Setting & Connection
l6Systems.jobFamily: Install, mount, connect, and wire major mechanical equipment and plumbing fixtures

l6Systems.name: Testing & Commissioning
l6Systems.jobFamily: Verify system integrity, balance flows/airflows, and commission controls to design spec

l6Systems.name: Service, Maintenance & Repair
l6Systems.jobFamily: Diagnose, maintain, and repair installed mechanical systems throughout their lifecycle

l6Systems.name: Quality Assurance & Code Compliance (H)
l6Systems.jobFamily: Ensure all work meets applicable building codes, permits, and quality standards

l6Systems.name: Health, Safety & Environmental (H)
l6Systems.jobFamily: Protect workers, occupants, and the environment throughout all project phases

vnUnits.name: Building Survey Instruments
vnUnits.functionalJob: Tools for physical measurement of the building envelope and existing mechanical infrastructure.

vnUnits.name: Load Calculation Software
vnUnits.functionalJob: Digital tools for HVAC load calculation per ACCA Manual J (residential) or ASHRAE methods (commercial).

vnUnits.name: Indoor Environment Testing
vnUnits.functionalJob: Instruments to characterize existing indoor conditions and identify deficiencies.

vnUnits.name: Pipe Fabrication & Joining
vnUnits.functionalJob: Tools for cutting, joining, and assembling piping networks across all media types.

vnUnits.name: Ductwork Fabrication & Installation
vnUnits.functionalJob: Equipment for fabricating and installing sheet-metal and flexible ductwork.

vnUnits.name: Refrigerant-Side Installation Tools
vnUnits.functionalJob: Required for all systems with refrigerant circuits (split AC, heat pumps, VRF).

vnUnits.name: Pressure Testing Equipment
vnUnits.functionalJob: Verifies pipe and duct system integrity before operation.

vnUnits.name: Hydraulic Balancing & Flow Measurement
vnUnits.functionalJob: Instruments for measuring and setting hydronic flow rates per zone to achieve design heat delivery. This is the primary insertion point for the Marquardt ultrasonic flow sensor in the HVAC contractor workflow.

vnUnits.name: Airflow Measurement & Balancing
vnUnits.functionalJob: Tools for verifying and adjusting air distribution in ducted HVAC systems.

vnUnits.name: Combustion Analysis
vnUnits.functionalJob: Required for gas-fired equipment commissioning and annual service.

vnUnits.name: Controls Commissioning
vnUnits.functionalJob: Verifying and programming building automation and HVAC control systems.

marquardtPosition: Marquardt's ultrasonic flow sensor sits at L4 within this domain.
